title: Peer under the bunk bed
negativePrompt: extra people, duplicate character, twin, clone, two of the same person, mirrored figure, background extras, third child, second sister, second joe
prompt: Wide shot in @BedroomSisters. @Sara on the LEFT and @Eva on the RIGHT crouch peering under the dark-wood bunk bed. @Joe behind them with paws on the floor sniffing the trundle drawer: "Yip yip!" @Sara: "Under the bed!"
